crons.name: contract-expiry
crons.prompt: Contract Expiry Check: Monday 9 AM. Scan ~/code/knowledge-sync/resources/reference/clearworks/ for contracts with expiry dates. Alert on anything expiring within 90 days. Send to Josh via Telegram (6690120787).

crons.name: compliance-review
crons.prompt: Compliance Review: Wednesday 10 AM. Check active client engagements for missing compliance docs (NDAs, DPAs, SOWs). Flag any gaps. Send to Josh via Telegram (6690120787) if action needed.
